questions.question: When deleting an item optimistically from a list, what must you save before removing it?
options: A deep clone of the entire array
The item reference and its original index
Only the item's ID for rollback

questions.question: When adding an item optimistically before the server responds, what ID strategy is recommended?
options: Leave the ID undefined until the server responds
Use a temporary ID (e.g., temp-${Date.now()}) and replace it on success
Use a UUID from the client permanently

questions.question: Which utility is used in the useOptimistic composable to snapshot the current state without reactivity?
